title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama as an LLM or chat backend.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM integration for local Ollama models; plug into RAG pipelines.

title: Ollama Web UI
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; no API keys needed, runs entirely local.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST endpoints with ergonomic commands and shell completions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri desktop app for chatting with Ollama models (macOS/Linux/Windows).

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit starter project that wires Ollama models into conversational AI apps with UI.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, delete models from JVM apps.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stacks (CPU & GPU) for running Ollama plus optional web UIs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK and CLI for Ollama; supports chat, generate, embeddings, and model ops.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers users via Ollama models; slash commands & thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, and answer questions using local Ollama LLMs.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama REST API with async/await and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to Ollama’s generate, chat, and embedding endpoints.
